results.rendered_html:
āśuśukṣaṇi (von śuc mit ā) adj. hervorblinkend: tvamagne dyubhistvamāśuśukṣaṇīḥ  ṚV. 2,1,1 .  NIR. 6,1 . Nach  Uṇ. 2,99  m. Feuer, Wind im Veda; nach  AK. 1,1,1,50 .  H. 1097  Feuer.
— Vgl. śuśukvani.

results.rendered_html:
āśuśukṣaṇi a. [ā śuṣ san ani  Uṇ. 2. 102 ]
1 Being worshipped on account of shining very quickly, or causing sorrow to one's enemies (Sāy).
2 Shining forth.
— ṇiḥ
1 Wind, air.
2 Fire; maṃtrapūtāni havīṃṣi pratigṛhṇātyetatprītyāśuśukṣaṇiḥ  K. 44.
